# llms.txt for GS Construction

> Family-owned kitchen, bathroom, and home remodeling contractor serving the Chicago suburbs since 2015. 40+ years combined experience, 5-star rated, English &amp; Polish.

## About
GS Construction is a licensed, bonded and insured remodeling contractor based in Prospect Heights, IL, operating since 2015 with 40+ years of combined experience. Family-owned, 5-star rated on Google, Yelp and Houzz. Free in-home estimates. Languages: English, Polish.

## Services
- Kitchen remodeling — cabinets, countertops, islands, flooring, lighting
- Bathroom remodeling — tile, vanities, showers, tubs, accessibility
- Whole-home remodeling & renovations
- Basement finishing
- Home additions
- Mudroom & laundry remodeling
- Custom cabinetry, countertop & tile installation

## Typical price ranges (Chicago suburbs, materials + labor)
- Kitchen remodel: $35,000–$80,000+
- Bathroom remodel: $15,000–$60,000
- Basement finishing: $45,000–$150,000
- Home addition: $60,000–$350,000+

## Service area
Chicago and surrounding suburbs (Cook, Lake, DuPage counties), IL. Priority cities: Palatine, Inverness, Arlington Heights, Hoffman Estates, Chicago, Western Springs, Lake Zurich, Barrington, Long Grove, Prospect Heights, Mount Prospect, Glencoe, Vernon Hills, Wheeling, Rolling Meadows, Evanston, Buffalo Grove, Kildeer.

## Why GS Construction
- Family-owned; one dedicated project lead per job (no rotating crews)
- Fixed, transparent pricing and clear timelines up front
- Licensed, bonded & insured; pulls all required permits
- 5-star rated with a large portfolio of completed local remodels
- English & Polish speaking
